titleStmt.title: SII 8.72: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 72. (A.R. No. 483 of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī manumahāmaṇḍalīśvaran harirāyavibhāṭan bhāṣai kku tappurāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ pūrvvadakṣiṇapacśimasamudrādipati śrīhari yappa Uṭaiyar kumārar vīraviruppaṇṇa Uṭaiyar pṛdhivirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷaāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 10 1- ṉmel cellāniṉṟa tulā nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa ttu tṛtī yaiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa ro hiṇi nāḷ śukla varuṣam
Āṉimātam 2 Ilakkiccanāyinārāṉa Arappāḷatevaṟku kal veṭṭikkuṭuttapaṭi . vūr nāṭu kiḻpaṟṟu pun ṉāttūr Ellaiil taāṉṟippaḷḷamum mūlāntikkollaiyum puñcainilamāy Itu kāṭu veṭṭi Entalum kaṇṭu kiṇaṟum kuḻittu nattamum kaṇṭu kuṭiyum Ēṟṟi karampum tiritti Accukkaṭṭākki payiṟ ceyyakaṭavarākavum payiṟ ceyyumiṭattu Inta Entalkaḷukku caṇḍeśvara peruvilai
āka niccayitta mūlāntikkollaikku paṇam 10 5- m tāṉṟippaḷḷattukku paṇam 10- m Āka paṇam 2 10 5- m pāḻeṟṟattukku mutalāka celavākkavum Inta Ental Arippāḷatevarentaleṉṟum Ilakkiccanāyinār Entaleṉṟum Oḻuku Eḻutippotavum Inta Entalkaḷ tamakku tāṉā(t)emaṉam vilai Oṟṟip pari kkiṟaiyattukkum Urittuāvatu Ākavum Inta Entalu
kku kiḻ koḷḷa nicceyitta kāṭu veṭṭi karampu tirutti Accukkaṭṭu Ākap payirceyta nilattukku veli Oṉṟukku Aṉaittāṇṭaikkum pacānam payircceyta nilattukku veli Oṉṟukku nellu Aimpatiṉkalamum navirai payirceyta nilattukku veli Oṉṟukku muppattueḻu kalaṉe tūṇip patakku nellum Aḷakkum
payiṟu veli Oṉṟukku Irutūṇi celavākavum pacānanavirai payiṟceyta nilattukku veli Oṉṟukkup poṉvarikku paṇam patiṉeḻaraiyum cantivikkiramattukku paṇam Iraṇṭaraiyum kāttikaippoṉṉukku paṇam Oṉṟum kāṇikkaikku paṇam 10 6 I-m Āka paṇam 3 10 7 I-m celavākkavum . Ippaṭi ve kuṭiyum Eṟṟi Ūraṭaṅkalum payiṟceytu candrāditya
varaiyum Aṉupavittuppokavum . Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 8.72 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
